description: First end-to-end use of the squashed worklist-history flow on this repo: cut v0.1.14.

items.before: Last release was v0.1.13 (commit cad4262). Since then we've landed the worklist-history feature — snapshot capture + .md changelog + augmented /__worklist + the History expander + the rename-aware hook — squashed into 879f9cd (code) and 15fe82b (docs). No version bump yet; the on-disk binary still identifies as 0.1.13.
items.after:
Standard release-cut per the conventions.md recipe:

1. Bump version `0.1.13` → `0.1.14` in `src-tauri/Cargo.toml` and `src-tauri/tauri.conf.json`.
2. `cargo build` to refresh `Cargo.lock`.
3. Commit message: `Release v0.1.14`.
4. Create local tag `v0.1.14` at the release commit.

Pushing the commits (agent-tools drawer push button), pushing the tag (`git push origin v0.1.14`), and dispatching `.github/workflows/build.yml` from the GitHub Actions UI are user-driven steps after the worklist item lands. Bumping minor instead of patch (0.2.0) is fair given the feature size — say so before approving if you'd prefer that.
